detail.description:
Pizza Ready, the ultimate pizza restaurant simulation game! 🍕🍽

Dive into an addictive restaurant game where cooking, management, and simulation come together in one delicious experience. 

If you love games about food, chefs, and running a busy kitchen, Pizza Ready is the perfect choice!

🍕 Run and Manage Your Own Pizza Restaurant! 🍕
Step into the role of a professional chef and pizza restaurant manager. Cook tasty dishes, follow recipes, design your menu, and serve customers efficiently.
